description: Style NoteWedge heels have been in style for quite long and with catwalk's new innovations they still remain in fashion. These pretty bright coloured heels will make you look stunning and can be matched with a skirt or a pair of capris.Heel: 2.5''Product DetailsBlunt toed sandals with thin teal straps at the forefoot and an ankle loop with a zipperBeads along the forefoot Brown footbed with a heel patchWedge heels with mat weave styling on the sidesTPU outsoleMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
